recommendations.overview: A young man in a tricky situation follows the advice of his unconventional best friend and uses social media to create a fake boyfriend to keep his awful ex-lover out of his life. But everything backfires when he meets the real love of his life, and

recommendations.title: Death Race 2000

recommendations.title: Jacky in the Kingdom of Women
recommendations.overview: In a country where women are in charge, a man goes to unusual lengths to make his dream of marrying the daughter of a military leader come true.

recommendations.title: Train of Life
recommendations.overview: In 1941, the inhabitants of a small Jewish village in Central Europe organize a fake deportation train so that they can escape the Nazis and flee to Palestine.

recommendations.title: Malevolent
recommendations.overview: A brother-sister team who fake paranormal encounters for cash get more than they bargained for when a job at a haunted estate turns very, very real.

recommendations.title: Cannonball

recommendations.title: Blackadder: Back & Forth
recommendations.genres: Comedy, History, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: What was a cunning plan from Lord Edmund Blackadder V to fake a time machine on his gullibly incompetent friends, turns out to be the real thing and hurls him and his imbecile underling, Baldrick, through the course of human history.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.
